addedBlocks:
## claude.ai Linear
When passing string values to tools, send the content directly without escape sequences. For example, use real newlines in markdown content rather than literal backslash-n (\n) characters.

attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

1	# Gameplay: Reakční souboj 1v1 (Fight Scene)
2	
3	> Popis pravidel a herní mechaniky. Implementační detaily viz `plan.md`.
4	
5	## Přehled
6	
7	1v1 reakční souboj. Vlevo zelený "player", vpravo bílý "enemy". Hra běží na pevném timestepu **16 ticků/s** — všechny časové parametry jsou v ticích. Mobilní portrétová orientace.
8	
9	**Cíl:** Dostat enemy `hp` na 0. Player v1 nesmrtelný. Pasivita je penalizována (zásah hráče regeneruje nepřítele).
10	
11	## Tick systém
12	
13	Veškerá herní logika běží na 16 Hz (≈62.5 ms/tick). Z toho se odvozují všechny délky stavů, telegrafů, útoků a cooldownů. Vykreslování běží na frame-rate displeje.
14	
15	## Enemy
16	
17	### Stats
18	- `hp = 100` (cap 100, min 0)
19	- `fatigue = 40` (cap 40, min 0)
20	
21	### Stavy
22	
23	| Stav | Délka (ticky) | Popis |
24	|---|---|---|
25	| `idle` | 32–64 (random) | Čeká mezi útoky, blokuje útoky hráče |
26	| `threat_weak` | 24 | Meč napřažen pro slabý útok |
27	| `threat_strong` | 32 | Meč napřažen pro silný útok (vizuálně: enemy obarven červeně) |
28	| `recovery_weak` | 8 | Recovery po slabém seku, zranitelný |
29	| `recovery_strong` | 16 | Recovery po silném seku, zranitelný |
30	| `exhausted` | 64 | `fatigue == 0`; neútočí, neblokuje, všechny útoky zasáhnou |
31	
32	### Přechody
33	
34	```
35	idle (po vypršení) ──► decide attack:
36	    ├─ 80 %: threat_weak  (24t) ──► [swing] ──► recovery_weak  (8t)  ──► idle
37	    └─ 20 %: threat_strong (32t) ──► [swing] ──► recovery_strong (16t) ──► idle
38	
39	fatigue → 0 (kdykoli) ──► exhausted (64t) ──► idle (fatigue := 40)
40	```
41	
42	`[swing]` je instant 0-tick event na posledním ticku threat fáze.
43	
44	### Reakce v `idle` na útok hráče
45	
46	| Útok hráče | Enemy efekt |
47	|---|---|
48	| weak | žádný (zablokuje) |
49	| strong | `fatigue −= 10` (zablokuje se ztrátou) |
50	
51	Vizuální feedback: v obou případech enemy svým mečem **vykryje** (krátký flinch nahoru a zpět) — hráč tak vidí, že swing nedopadl, místo aby zíral na statického enemy.
52	
53	### Reakce v `recovery_*` / `exhausted` na útok hráče
54	
55	| Útok hráče | Efekt |
56	|---|---|
57	| weak | `enemy.hp −= 15` |
58	| strong | `enemy.hp −= 25` |
59	
60	### Reakce v `threat_*` na útok hráče
61	
62	Žádný efekt. Telegraph nelze přerušit.
63	
64	## Player
65	
66	### Stats (v1)
67	Žádné. Player je invincible.
68	
69	### Stavy
70	
71	| Stav | Délka (ticky) | Popis |
72	|---|---|---|
73	| `idle` | — | Přijímá input |
74	| `attacking_weak` | 4 (instant swing + 4t recover), pak 12t cooldown | Rychlý slabý útok — žádný telegraph, swing na 1. ticku. Cooldown zahrnuje recovery, takže net čekání po návratu do `idle` je ~8t (0.5 s). |
75	| `attacking_strong` | 16 (6 windup + 10 recover) | Silný útok — krátký telegraph 6 ticků |
76	| `blocking` | dokud držíš `↓` | Obrana — prvních 8 ticků "active parry" (drainuje enemy fatigue při weak útoku), dále jen pasivní (chrání, ale fatigue nedrainuje). Re-press resetuje window. |
77	| `dodging` | 8 (6 invincibility + 2 recover), pak 24t cooldown | Úhyb |
78	
79	Během `attacking_*` a `dodging` jsou ostatní vstupy ignorovány. `blocking` opustíš puštěním `↓`. Weak cooldown blokuje jen další `→` — block / dodge / strong jsou v jeho průběhu volné.
80	
81	### Klávesy
82	
83	Šipky (dpad-style):
84	
85	- `→` (vpravo, tap) — fast weak attack (instant swing + 4t recovery)
86	- `↑` (nahoru) — strong attack
87	- `↓` (dolů, hold) — block
88	- `←` (vlevo, tap) — dodge
89	
90	`Space` (mimo gameplay) restartuje scénu po výhře.
91	
92	### Swing event hráče
93	
94	- **weak:** Po stisku `→` swing event okamžitě (0-tick windup), hráč přejde do 4-tickového `attacking_weak` recovery, pak ~8t v idle s aktivním cooldownem (celkem 12t od stisku). Fixní damage 15 HP. Reakční nástroj na enemy recovery / exhausted; cooldown drží svižnost tím, že brání spam-mashi.
95	
96	- **strong:** Swing event na **6. ticku** stavu `attacking_strong` (recovery 7.–16.). Fixní damage 25 HP.
97	
98	> Charging weak attack varianta (drž `→` pro nabíjení 1–15 HP) byla prototypovaná v commitu `317b1d2` a později reverted. Archiv designu + kódu: `features/charge.md`.
99	
100	V obou případech se efekt aplikuje na enemy na základě jeho aktuálního stavu (viz Enemy tabulky výše) a současně se spustí swing animace.
101	
102	## Swing resolve (na posledním ticku enemy `threat_*`)
103	
104	V pořadí:
105	
106	1. `player.state == dodging` → **miss**. Žádný efekt.
107	2. Slabý útok (`threat_weak`) a `player.state == blocking`:
108	   - **Active parry** (block započal v posledních 8 tickách): `enemy.fatigue −= 10`. Žádný hit.
109	   - **Pasivní block** (block drží déle než 8 ticků): hráč chráněn, ale žádný drain. Žádný hit.
110	3. Silný útok (`threat_strong`) a `player.state == blocking` → **blok neúčinný** (fall-through na 4).
111	4. Jinak → **hráč zasažen**:
112	   - `enemy.hp = min(100, enemy.hp + 10)`
113	   - `enemy.fatigue = min(40, enemy.fatigue + 30)`
114	
115	Filozofie: zásah hráče **regeneruje** nepřítele — player je invincible, takže pasivita musí být penalizována.
116	
117	## Win condition
118	
119	- `enemy.hp <= 0` → "VÝHRA" overlay. `Space` restartuje scénu.
120	- Lose condition v1 neexistuje.
121	
122	## Souhrn FSM diagramů
123	
124	### Enemy
125	```
126	                  ┌── 80 % ──► threat_weak (24t) ──[swing]──► recovery_weak  (8t)  ──┐
127	idle (32–64t) ───►│                                                                 │
128	                  └── 20 % ──► threat_strong (32t) ─[swing]──► recovery_strong (16t) ──┤
129	                                                                                     ▼
130	                                          ┌──────────────────────────────────────  idle (loop)
131	fatigue → 0 ───► exhausted (64t) ──► idle (fatigue=40)
132	```
133	
134	### Player
135	```
136	idle ──┬─ → tap ──► attacking_weak (0t windup + 4t recovery, swing instant) ──► idle
137	       ├─ ↑     ──► attacking_strong (16t, swing na 6. ticku) ──► idle
138	       ├─ ↓ ↓   ──► blocking ─(↓ ↑)─► idle
139	       └─ ← tap ──► dodging (8t) ──► idle  (+ 24t cooldown na další dodge)
140	```
141	
142	## Co tento gameplay v1 nepokrývá
143	
144	- Touch input pro mobil — v1 jen klávesnice.
145	- Více typů nepřátel — v1 jen jeden základní vzor (32–64 idle, 20 % strong).
146	- Player stats (HP, stamina) — v1 invincible.
147	- Postup / level progression — v1 jediný souboj, restart po výhře.
148

file.content:
# Gameplay: Reakční souboj 1v1 (Fight Scene)

> Popis pravidel a herní mechaniky. Implementační detaily viz `plan.md`.

## Přehled

1v1 reakční souboj. Vlevo zelený "player", vpravo bílý "enemy". Hra běží na pevném timestepu **16 ticků/s** — všechny časové parametry jsou v ticích. Mobilní portrétová orientace.

**Cíl:** Dostat enemy `hp` na 0. Player v1 nesmrtelný. Pasivita je penalizována (zásah hráče regeneruje nepřítele).

## Tick systém

Veškerá herní logika běží na 16 Hz (≈62.5 ms/tick). Z toho se odvozují všechny délky stavů, telegrafů, útoků a cooldownů. Vykreslování běží na frame-rate displeje.

## Enemy

### Stats
- `hp = 100` (cap 100, min 0)
- `fatigue = 40` (cap 40, min 0)

### Stavy

| Stav | Délka (ticky) | Popis |
|---|---|---|
| `idle` | 32–64 (random) | Čeká mezi útoky, blokuje útoky hráče |
| `threat_weak` | 24 | Meč napřažen pro slabý útok |
| `threat_strong` | 32 | Meč napřažen pro silný útok (vizuálně: enemy obarven červeně) |
| `recovery_weak` | 8 | Recovery po slabém seku, zranitelný |
| `recovery_strong` | 16 | Recovery po silném seku, zranitelný |
| `exhausted` | 64 | `fatigue == 0`; neútočí, neblokuje, všechny útoky zasáhnou |

### Přechody

```
idle (po vypršení) ──► decide attack:
    ├─ 80 %: threat_weak  (24t) ──► [swing] ──► recovery_weak  (8t)  ──► idle
    └─ 20 %: threat_strong (32t) ──► [swing] ──► recovery_strong (16t) ──► idle

fatigue → 0 (kdykoli) ──► exhausted (64t) ──► idle (fatigue := 40)
```

`[swing]` je instant 0-tick event na posledním ticku threat fáze.

### Reakce v `idle` na útok hráče

| Útok hráče | Enemy efekt |
|---|---|
| weak | žádný (zablokuje) |
| strong | `fatigue −= 10` (zablokuje se ztrátou) |

Vizuální feedback: v obou případech enemy svým mečem **vykryje** (krátký flinch nahoru a zpět) — hráč tak vidí, že swing nedopadl, místo aby zíral na statického enemy.

### Reakce v `recovery_*` / `exhausted` na útok hráče

| Útok hráče | Efekt |
|---|---|
| weak | `enemy.hp −= 15` |
| strong | `enemy.hp −= 25` |

### Reakce v `threat_*` na útok hráče

Žádný efekt. Telegraph nelze přerušit.

## Player

### Stats (v1)
Žádné. Player je invincible.

### Stavy

| Stav | Délka (ticky) | Popis |
|---|---|---|
| `idle` | — | Přijímá input |
| `attacking_weak` | 4 (instant swing + 4t recover), pak 12t cooldown | Rychlý slabý útok — žádný telegraph, swing na 1. ticku. Cooldown zahrnuje recovery, takže net čekání po návratu do `idle` je ~8t (0.5 s). |
| `attacking_strong` | 16 (6 windup + 10 recover) | Silný útok — krátký telegraph 6 ticků |
| `blocking` | dokud držíš `↓` | Obrana — prvních 8 ticků "active parry" (drainuje enemy fatigue při weak útoku), dále jen pasivní (chrání, ale fatigue nedrainuje). Re-press resetuje window. |
| `dodging` | 8 (6 invincibility + 2 recover), pak 24t cooldown | Úhyb |

Během `attacking_*` a `dodging` jsou ostatní vstupy ignorovány. `blocking` opustíš puštěním `↓`. Weak cooldown blokuje jen další `→` — block / dodge / strong jsou v jeho průběhu volné.

### Klávesy

Šipky (dpad-style):

- `→` (vpravo, tap) — fast weak attack (instant swing + 4t recovery)
- `↑` (nahoru) — strong attack
- `↓` (dolů, hold) — block
- `←` (vlevo, tap) — dodge

`Space` (mimo gameplay) restartuje scénu po výhře.

### Swing event hráče

- **weak:** Po stisku `→` swing event okamžitě (0-tick windup), hráč přejde do 4-tickového `attacking_weak` recovery, pak ~8t v idle s aktivním cooldownem (celkem 12t od stisku). Fixní damage 15 HP. Reakční nástroj na enemy recovery / exhausted; cooldown drží svižnost tím, že brání spam-mashi.

- **strong:** Swing event na **6. ticku** stavu `attacking_strong` (recovery 7.–16.). Fixní damage 25 HP.

> Charging weak attack varianta (drž `→` pro nabíjení 1–15 HP) byla prototypovaná v commitu `317b1d2` a později reverted. Archiv designu + kódu: `features/charge.md`.

V obou případech se efekt aplikuje na enemy na základě jeho aktuálního stavu (viz Enemy tabulky výše) a současně se spustí swing animace.

## Swing resolve (na posledním ticku enemy `threat_*`)

V pořadí:

1. `player.state == dodging` → **miss**. Žádný efekt.
2. Slabý útok (`threat_weak`) a `player.state == blocking`:
   - **Active parry** (block započal v posledních 8 tickách): `enemy.fatigue −= 10`. Žádný hit.
   - **Pasivní block** (block drží déle než 8 ticků): hráč chráněn, ale žádný drain. Žádný hit.
3. Silný útok (`threat_strong`) a `player.state == blocking` → **blok neúčinný** (fall-through na 4).
4. Jinak → **hráč zasažen**:
   - `enemy.hp = min(100, enemy.hp + 10)`
   - `enemy.fatigue = min(40, enemy.fatigue + 30)`

Filozofie: zásah hráče **regeneruje** nepřítele — player je invincible, takže pasivita musí být penalizována.

## Win condition

- `enemy.hp <= 0` → "VÝHRA" overlay. `Space` restartuje scénu.
- Lose condition v1 neexistuje.

## Souhrn FSM diagramů

### Enemy
```
                  ┌── 80 % ──► threat_weak (24t) ──[swing]──► recovery_weak  (8t)  ──┐
idle (32–64t) ───►│                                                                 │
                  └── 20 % ──► threat_strong (32t) ─[swing]──► recovery_strong (16t) ──┤
                                                                                     ▼
                                          ┌──────────────────────────────────────  idle (loop)
fatigue → 0 ───► exhausted (64t) ──► idle (fatigue=40)
```

### Player
```
idle ──┬─ → tap ──► attacking_weak (0t windup + 4t recovery, swing instant) ──► idle
       ├─ ↑     ──► attacking_strong (16t, swing na 6. ticku) ──► idle
       ├─ ↓ ↓   ──► blocking ─(↓ ↑)─► idle
       └─ ← tap ──► dodging (8t) ──► idle  (+ 24t cooldown na další dodge)
```

## Co tento gameplay v1 nepokrývá

- Touch input pro mobil — v1 jen klávesnice.
- Více typů nepřátel — v1 jen jeden základní vzor (32–64 idle, 20 % strong).
- Player stats (HP, stamina) — v1 invincible.
- Postup / level progression — v1 jediný souboj, restart po výhře.

content.content:
1	# Implementační plán: Fight Scene
2	
3	> Technický plán implementace. Herní pravidla, FSM, timingy a balance viz `gameplay.md`.
4	
5	## Cílové prostředí
6	
7	- Godot **4.x** (vyvíjeno na 4.6 mobile profil; bez fyziky, bez collision shapes — vše manuálně).
8	- Viewport **720×1280** portrait. `window/stretch/mode="viewport"` doporučeno.
9	- Vstup v1: **klávesnice — šipky** (`→` weak, `↑` strong, `↓` block-hold, `←` dodge; `Space` restart po výhře). Touch input je odložený TODO.
10	- Žádné `PhysicsBody`, žádné `Area2D` — kolize/hit checks čistě stavové.
11	
12	## Tick smyčka
13	
14	Pevný timestep 16 Hz akumulátorem v `_process`:
15	
16	```gdscript
17	const TICKS_PER_SECOND := 16
18	const TICK_DURATION := 1.0 / TICKS_PER_SECOND
19	var tick_acc := 0.0
20	
21	func _process(delta: float) -> void:
22	    tick_acc += delta
23	    while tick_acc >= TICK_DURATION:
24	        tick_acc -= TICK_DURATION
25	        _on_tick()
26	    queue_redraw()
27	```
28	
29	V `_on_tick()`:
30	```
31	player.tick()              # state countdown, dodge cooldown
32	enemy.tick()               # state countdown
33	if enemy.swing_this_tick:  # poslední tick threat fáze
34	    _resolve_enemy_swing()
35	if player.swing_this_tick: # poslední tick windupu attacking_*
36	    _resolve_player_swing()
37	hud.update(...)
38	```
39	
40	Pokud framerate klesne pod 16fps, while-loop dohoní ticky. State countdowns, AI rozhodnutí, swing resolve i hit resolve běží **výhradně** v `_on_tick()`.
41	
42	## Architektura souborů
43	
44	```
45	fight.tscn             # kořenová scéna (Node2D), instancuje Player + Enemy + HUD
46	fight.gd               # tick loop, swing/hit resolve, HUD update, win check
47	
48	combatant.gd           # class_name Combatant extends Node2D
49	                       #   hp, fatigue, state, state_ticks_remaining
50	                       #   set_state(name, ticks), tick()
51	
52	enemy.gd               # class_name Enemy extends Combatant
53	                       #   abstract: _pick_attack(rng) -> StringName ("weak"|"strong")
54	                       #   abstract: _pick_idle_duration(rng) -> int
55	
56	enemy_basic.gd         # extends Enemy — první typ
57	                       #   _pick_attack: 20 % strong / 80 % weak
58	                       #   _pick_idle_duration: randi_range(32, 64)
59	
60	player.gd              # extends Combatant
61	                       #   input → state transitions
62	                       #   dodge_cooldown_ticks
63	
64	sprites/               # spritesheety + dokumentace
65	  player.png                 #   body, 224×32, 7 cells of 32×32 (stance per cell)
66	  player_weapon.png          #   weapon overlay, identický layout jako body
67	  enemy_basic.png            #   body, 192×32, 6 cells of 32×32
68	  enemy_basic_weapon.png     #   weapon overlay, identický layout jako body
69	  SPRITES.md                 #   per-cell stance spec + extension guide
70	
71	hud.gd                 # CanvasLayer
72	                       #   update(enemy_hp, enemy_fatigue, enemy_state, enemy_state_ticks,
73	                       #          player_state, player_state_ticks_or_active_block,
74	                       #          dodge_cd, show_win)
75	                       #   bary nad enemy se kreslí v enemy.gd, HUD je už jen debug + win overlay.
76	```
77	
78	`fight.tscn` jako main scéna (`run/main_scene="res://fight.tscn"` v `project.godot`).
79	
80	Třída `Combatant` je base pro `Player` i `Enemy`, drží společná pole (`hp`, `fatigue`, `state`, `state_ticks_remaining`). `Enemy` přidává abstract hooky pro per-type chování — `enemy_basic.gd` je první konkrétní implementace, další typy se přidají jako nové podtřídy `Enemy` bez dotyku base classy.
81	
82	## Tunable konstanty
83	
84	Tyto hodnoty jsou v `balance.json` a načítají se autoload singletonem `Balance` při startu. Tabulky níže slouží jako reference defaultů; reálné runtime hodnoty ber z JSONu. Kód odkazuje na `Balance.<field>` (např. `Balance.hp_damage_weak`).
85	
86	Vizuální / animační konstanty (`TICKS_PER_SECOND`, `SPRITE_*`, bar dimensions, shake/particle hodnoty) zůstávají v `const` blocích na vrcholu příslušných skriptů.
87	
88	**`balance.json`** (defaults mirrored from below):
89	
90	```json
91	{
92	  "combatant": { "hp_max": 100, "fatigue_max": 40 },
93	  "player": {
94	    "attack_weak_windup": 0, "attack_weak_recover": 4, "attack_weak_cooldown": 12,
95	    "attack_strong_windup": 6, "attack_strong_recover": 10,
96	    "dodge_invincibility": 6, "dodge_recover": 2, "dodge_cooldown": 24,
97	    "block_active_ticks": 8
98	  },
99	  "enemy_basic": {
100	    "threat_weak_ticks": 8, "threat_strong_ticks": 16,
101	    "recovery_weak_ticks": 8, "recovery_strong_ticks": 16,
102	    "exhausted_ticks": 64,
103	    "idle_min_ticks": 32, "idle_max_ticks": 64,
104	    "strong_probability": 0.20
105	  },
106	  "fight": {
107	    "hp_damage_weak": 15, "hp_damage_strong": 25,
108	    "enemy_fatigue_blocked_weak": 10, "enemy_fatigue_player_strong_idle": 10,
109	    "enemy_hp_regen_on_hit": 10, "enemy_fatigue_regen_on_hit": 30,
110	    "hit_flash_ticks": 3
111	  }
112	}
113	```
114	
115	**`enemy_basic`** (per-enemy-type AI tunables) — viz `enemy_basic.gd`, vše čte z `Balance.*`:
116	- `threat_weak_ticks` / `threat_strong_ticks` — délka napřahu weak / strong (ticky)
117	- `recovery_weak_ticks` / `recovery_strong_ticks` — délka recovery po seku
118	- `exhausted_ticks` — doba exhausted state (po vyčerpání fatigue)
119	- `idle_min_ticks` / `idle_max_ticks` — rozsah random idle pauzy
120	- `strong_probability` — pravděpodobnost strong útoku (0.20 = 20 %)
121	
122	**`player`** — viz `player.gd`:
123	- `attack_weak_windup = 0` (weak je instant — swing fires na stisk)
124	- `attack_weak_recover = 4`, `attack_weak_cooldown = 12` (cooldown počítá i recovery; net čekání po idle ≈ 8t)
125	- `attack_strong_windup = 6` (strong má krátký telegraph 6 ticků), `attack_strong_recover = 10`
126	- `dodge_invincibility = 6`, `dodge_recover = 2`, `dodge_cooldown = 24`
127	- `block_active_ticks = 8` (první N ticků blocking jsou "active parry" — drain fatigue)
128	
129	**`fight`** (resolve numbers) — viz `fight.gd`:
130	- `hp_damage_weak = 15`, `hp_damage_strong = 25`
131	- `enemy_fatigue_blocked_weak = 10`, `enemy_fatigue_player_strong_idle = 10`
132	- `enemy_hp_regen_on_hit = 10`, `enemy_fatigue_regen_on_hit = 30`
133	- `hit_flash_ticks = 3`
134	
135	**`combatant`** — viz `combatant.gd`:
136	- `hp_max = 100`, `fatigue_max = 40` (caps pro `clampi` + HUD percenta v `enemy.gd`)
137	
138	Pokud `balance.json` chybí / je rozbitý, `balance.gd._load_balance()` zaloguje `push_error` a ponechá defaults v deklaracích `var` (kód se nezhroutí).
139	
140	> Charging weak varianta (drž `→` pro 1–15 damage) je archivovaná v `features/charge.md` pro pozdější návrat.
141	
142	## Stance sprite rendering
143	
144	Combatant = dva `Sprite2D` child nody (body + weapon overlay), oba s `region_rect` cell-pickerem nad horizontálními spritesheety. Žádné inter-pose animace, žádný `AnimationPlayer`, žádné lerpy — každý FSM stance má **právě jednu** buňku v sheetu a změna stancu = swap `region_rect` na hranici ticku. Body sprite je `add_child`ován jako první → kreslí se pod weapon spritem (Godot child draw order).
145	
146	**Layout:**
147	- Body sheet: `res://sprites/<character>.png` (horizontální strip).
148	- Weapon sheet: `res://sprites/<character>_weapon.png` (**identický layout** — stejný count cell, stejný cell size, stejné pořadí stancí). Index se počítá jednou a aplikuje na oba sprity současně.
149	- Cell size je per-character const v `.gd` (`SPRITE_CELL_SIZE`):
150	  - `player.png` / `player_weapon.png` — 224×32, 7 cells of 32×32
151	  - `enemy_basic.png` / `enemy_basic_weapon.png` — 192×32, 6 cells of 32×32
152	- Display scale ×8 (`SPRITE_SCALE`) s `texture_filter = NEAREST` pro pixel-perfect rendering — 32px cell → 256px na obrazovce. Hit flash modulate se aplikuje na obě vrstvy.
153	
154	**Mapování stance → cell:**
155	`SPRITE_INDEX := { &"<stance>": <idx>, ... }` v každém combatant `.gd`. `_update_sprite()` se volá na konci `tick()` (a okamžitě po `set_state(...)` ve vstupních handlerech v `player.gd`), nastaví `region_rect` a `modulate`.
156	
157	**Sub-stance (jen player):**
158	`_current_visual_stance()` odvozuje vizuální stance z FSM stavu + sub-state proměnných:
159	- `attacking_strong` + `windup_ticks_remaining > 0` → `attacking_strong_windup`
160	- `attacking_strong` + `windup_ticks_remaining == 0` → `attacking_strong_recovery`
161	- `blocking` + `is_active_block()` → `blocking_active`
162	- `blocking` + jinak → `blocking_passive`
163	
164	Enemy nemá sub-stance — mapování `state -> idx` je 1:1.
165	
166	**Hit flash:** `sprite.modulate = Color(2.5, 2.5, 2.5, 1.0)` po dobu `hit_flash_ticks > 0`, jinak `Color.WHITE`. Žádný separate flash sprite cell.
167	
168	**Per-character cell spec a extension guide:** viz `sprites/SPRITES.md`.
169	
170	## Vizuální layout (720×1280)
171	
172	```
173	+------------------------+
174	|     [Background.png]   |  ← horní 2/5 viewportu (0..512), CanvasLayer layer=-1
175	|     (scale ×2, anchor) |     (568×440 centrovaný horizontálně, bottom @ y=512)
176	|                        |
177	|                        |
178	|              [HP]      |  ← floating bars nad enemy (drawn v enemy.gd):
179	|              [Fat]     |     HP 120×10 @ y_off=−150, Fatigue 120×6 @ y_off=−138
180	|   [PLAYER]   [ENEMY]   |  ← y=384 (sprite bottom @ 3/5 z dolního okraje), scaled ×8 (~256 px)
181	|   (stance)   (stance)  |    player.x=264, enemy.x=456 (~8 src-px overlap při scale ×8)
182	|                        |
183	|                        |
184	|                        |
185	|  ↑=strong  →=weak      |  ← y≈1200, debug hint text
186	|  ↓=block   ←=dodge     |
187	+------------------------+
188	```
189	
190	**Background** (`sprites/Background.png`, 284×206 src-px) je v `fight.tscn` jako `Sprite2D` uvnitř `CanvasLayer` s `layer = -1`, čímž se renderuje pod combatants i HUDem. `texture_filter = NEAREST`, integer scale ×6 → 1704×1236 px (přesahuje viewport nahoře i po stranách, záměrně). Bottom-anchored na "podlahu" y=512 (kde stojí postavy), position = `(360, -106)`. Pokud změníš výšku bg textury (cropnutím/přidáním), drž `position.y = 512 - (height * scale / 2)` aby bottom seděl s nohama postav. **Screen shake:** Fight.gd mirruje `position` (Node2D shake offset) do `background_canvas.offset` v `_update_shake`, takže bg se třese společně s ostatními combatants.
191	
192	Pozice jsou vodítka — finální doladit po hraní. Sprite je child node combatantu se default position (0,0) — pohyb combatantu (shake) ho táhne s sebou.
193	
194	**HP + fatigue bary enemy** jsou drawn v `enemy.gd._draw()` jako floating bary nad tělem (HP 120×10 px na y_off=−82, fatigue 120×6 px na y_off=−70 od středu). Důsledek: bary se hýbou se screen shake (parent `Fight` Node2D má shake offset → enemy + bary se posunou společně) a hit flash na ně nepůsobí (bary jsou samostatné draw cally po body rectu, ne tělo). `Combatant.damage_hp/heal_hp/add_fatigue/drain_fatigue` volají `queue_redraw()` aby se bar refreshly mimo state-transition ticky. HUD je už jen debug text + win overlay.
195	
196	Vizuální stav indikace:
197	- Stance sprite swap (jedna buňka per stance) — viz `sprites/SPRITES.md`.
198	- **Polish vrstva** (`fight.gd`, čistě prezentační — gameplay neovlivňuje):
199	  - Screen shake při hitech, amplitude per-event (weak / strong / fatigue). Decay 30 px/s.
200	  - Hit flash: zasažený combatant 3 ticky bílý (`hit_flash_ticks` v `Combatant` se propaguje jako `sprite.modulate = Color(2.5, 2.5, 2.5, 1.0)` v `_update_sprite()`).
201	  - Particles: malé čtverečky odlétávají z bodu zásahu (oranžové = HP damage, žluté = fatigue drain). Per-frame update v `_process`, life ~0.45 s, alpha fade, drag 0.92. Spawn pouze na tick boundaries v resolve funkcích.
202	
203	## Verifikace (manuální testy)
204	
205	Po implementaci spustit `fight.tscn` a projít:
206	
207	1. **Idle baseline:** nedělej nic 30 s → enemy útočí pravidelně, `hp` na cap 100, `fatigue` na cap 40. HP bar plný, fatigue bar plný.
208	2. **Active parry weak:** stiskni `↓` těsně před weak telegraph → enemy.fatigue −= 10 (25 % bar). Mimo 8-tick window → pouze ochrání, žádný drain.
209	3. **Blok strong neúčinný:** drž `↓` před strong telegraph (červený enemy) → enemy získá +10 HP / +30 fatigue. (Pokud jsou na capu, zůstanou na capu — pro test sniž je nejdřív hitem.)
210	4. **Dodge:** stiskni `←` ve správný čas → miss, žádný efekt. Druhý `←` během 24-tick cooldown nesmí zafungovat.
211	5. **Strong v idle:** stiskni `↑` během enemy idle → `enemy.fatigue −= 10`. Opakuj 4× → enemy přejde do `exhausted` na 64 ticků (vizuálně šedý).
212	6. **Weak v recovery:** stiskni `→` po enemy seku → `enemy.hp −= 15`. Swing je instant (žádný windup).
213	7. **Strong v exhausted:** během `exhausted` stiskni `↑` → `enemy.hp −= 25`.
214	8. **Win:** doved enemy HP na 0 → "VÝHRA" overlay, `Space` zavolá `reload_current_scene()`.
215	9. **Tunable:** změň jednu konstantu (např. `THREAT_WEAK_TICKS := 12` v `enemy_basic.gd`) a ověř, že timing slabého napřahu se zrychlí.
216	
217	## Mimo scope této iterace (technické)
218	
219	- Reálný stance art (zatím jen barevné dummy buňky); skutečný pixel-art vyplní stejné 24×N buňky.
220	- Inter-pose animace (multi-frame sprites na stance, `AnimationPlayer`).
221	- Touch input pro mobil — UI vrstva pro dotyková tlačítka, gesture detection.
222	- Další podtřídy `Enemy` (base připravena, ale jen `enemy_basic` v této iteraci).
223	- Player stats (HP, stamina) — `Combatant` to umožní bez refaktoru.
224	- Zvuky, hudba, particle efekty, screenshake.
225	- Persistence skóre, save game.
226	- Menu / scene flow vně `fight.tscn`.
227

# Implementační plán: Fight Scene

> Technický plán implementace. Herní pravidla, FSM, timingy a balance viz `gameplay.md`.

## Cílové prostředí

- Godot **4.x** (vyvíjeno na 4.6 mobile profil; bez fyziky, bez collision shapes — vše manuálně).
- Viewport **720×1280** portrait. `window/stretch/mode="viewport"` doporučeno.
- Vstup v1: **klávesnice — šipky** (`→` weak, `↑` strong, `↓` block-hold, `←` dodge; `Space` restart po výhře). Touch input je odložený TODO.
- Žádné `PhysicsBody`, žádné `Area2D` — kolize/hit checks čistě stavové.

## Tick smyčka

Pevný timestep 16 Hz akumulátorem v `_process`:

```gdscript
const TICKS_PER_SECOND := 16
const TICK_DURATION := 1.0 / TICKS_PER_SECOND
var tick_acc := 0.0

func _process(delta: float) -> void:
    tick_acc += delta
    while tick_acc >= TICK_DURATION:
        tick_acc -= TICK_DURATION
        _on_tick()
    queue_redraw()
```

V `_on_tick()`:
```
player.tick()              # state countdown, dodge cooldown
enemy.tick()               # state countdown
if enemy.swing_this_tick:  # poslední tick threat fáze
    _resolve_enemy_swing()
if player.swing_this_tick: # poslední tick windupu attacking_*
    _resolve_player_swing()
hud.update(...)
```

Pokud framerate klesne pod 16fps, while-loop dohoní ticky. State countdowns, AI rozhodnutí, swing resolve i hit resolve běží **výhradně** v `_on_tick()`.

## Architektura souborů

```
fight.tscn             # kořenová scéna (Node2D), instancuje Player + Enemy + HUD
fight.gd               # tick loop, swing/hit resolve, HUD update, win check

combatant.gd           # class_name Combatant extends Node2D
                       #   hp, fatigue, state, state_ticks_remaining
                       #   set_state(name, ticks), tick()

enemy.gd               # class_name Enemy extends Combatant
                       #   abstract: _pick_attack(rng) -> StringName ("weak"|"strong")
                       #   abstract: _pick_idle_duration(rng) -> int

enemy_basic.gd         # extends Enemy — první typ
                       #   _pick_attack: 20 % strong / 80 % weak
                       #   _pick_idle_duration: randi_range(32, 64)

player.gd              # extends Combatant
                       #   input → state transitions
                       #   dodge_cooldown_ticks

sprites/               # spritesheety + dokumentace
  player.png                 #   body, 224×32, 7 cells of 32×32 (stance per cell)
  player_weapon.png          #   weapon overlay, identický layout jako body
  enemy_basic.png            #   body, 192×32, 6 cells of 32×32
  enemy_basic_weapon.png     #   weapon overlay, identický layout jako body
  SPRITES.md                 #   per-cell stance spec + extension guide

hud.gd                 # CanvasLayer
                       #   update(enemy_hp, enemy_fatigue, enemy_state, enemy_state_ticks,
                       #          player_state, player_state_ticks_or_active_block,
                       #          dodge_cd, show_win)
                       #   bary nad enemy se kreslí v enemy.gd, HUD je už jen debug + win overlay.
```

`fight.tscn` jako main scéna (`run/main_scene="res://fight.tscn"` v `project.godot`).

Třída `Combatant` je base pro `Player` i `Enemy`, drží společná pole (`hp`, `fatigue`, `state`, `state_ticks_remaining`). `Enemy` přidává abstract hooky pro per-type chování — `enemy_basic.gd` je první konkrétní implementace, další typy se přidají jako nové podtřídy `Enemy` bez dotyku base classy.

## Tunable konstanty

Tyto hodnoty jsou v `balance.json` a načítají se autoload singletonem `Balance` při startu. Tabulky níže slouží jako reference defaultů; reálné runtime hodnoty ber z JSONu. Kód odkazuje na `Balance.<field>` (např. `Balance.hp_damage_weak`).

Vizuální / animační konstanty (`TICKS_PER_SECOND`, `SPRITE_*`, bar dimensions, shake/particle hodnoty) zůstávají v `const` blocích na vrcholu příslušných skriptů.

**`balance.json`** (defaults mirrored from below):

```json
{
  "combatant": { "hp_max": 100, "fatigue_max": 40 },
  "player": {
    "attack_weak_windup": 0, "attack_weak_recover": 4, "attack_weak_cooldown": 12,
    "attack_strong_windup": 6, "attack_strong_recover": 10,
    "dodge_invincibility": 6, "dodge_recover": 2, "dodge_cooldown": 24,
    "block_active_ticks": 8
  },
  "enemy_basic": {
    "threat_weak_ticks": 8, "threat_strong_ticks": 16,
    "recovery_weak_ticks": 8, "recovery_strong_ticks": 16,
    "exhausted_ticks": 64,
    "idle_min_ticks": 32, "idle_max_ticks": 64,
    "strong_probability": 0.20
  },
  "fight": {
    "hp_damage_weak": 15, "hp_damage_strong": 25,
    "enemy_fatigue_blocked_weak": 10, "enemy_fatigue_player_strong_idle": 10,
    "enemy_hp_regen_on_hit": 10, "enemy_fatigue_regen_on_hit": 30,
    "hit_flash_ticks": 3
  }
}
```

**`enemy_basic`** (per-enemy-type AI tunables) — viz `enemy_basic.gd`, vše čte z `Balance.*`:
- `threat_weak_ticks` / `threat_strong_ticks` — délka napřahu weak / strong (ticky)
- `recovery_weak_ticks` / `recovery_strong_ticks` — délka recovery po seku
- `exhausted_ticks` — doba exhausted state (po vyčerpání fatigue)
- `idle_min_ticks` / `idle_max_ticks` — rozsah random idle pauzy
- `strong_probability` — pravděpodobnost strong útoku (0.20 = 20 %)

**`player`** — viz `player.gd`:
- `attack_weak_windup = 0` (weak je instant — swing fires na stisk)
- `attack_weak_recover = 4`, `attack_weak_cooldown = 12` (cooldown počítá i recovery; net čekání po idle ≈ 8t)
- `attack_strong_windup = 6` (strong má krátký telegraph 6 ticků), `attack_strong_recover = 10`
- `dodge_invincibility = 6`, `dodge_recover = 2`, `dodge_cooldown = 24`
- `block_active_ticks = 8` (první N ticků blocking jsou "active parry" — drain fatigue)

**`fight`** (resolve numbers) — viz `fight.gd`:
- `hp_damage_weak = 15`, `hp_damage_strong = 25`
- `enemy_fatigue_blocked_weak = 10`, `enemy_fatigue_player_strong_idle = 10`
- `enemy_hp_regen_on_hit = 10`, `enemy_fatigue_regen_on_hit = 30`
- `hit_flash_ticks = 3`

**`combatant`** — viz `combatant.gd`:
- `hp_max = 100`, `fatigue_max = 40` (caps pro `clampi` + HUD percenta v `enemy.gd`)

Pokud `balance.json` chybí / je rozbitý, `balance.gd._load_balance()` zaloguje `push_error` a ponechá defaults v deklaracích `var` (kód se nezhroutí).

> Charging weak varianta (drž `→` pro 1–15 damage) je archivovaná v `features/charge.md` pro pozdější návrat.

## Stance sprite rendering

Combatant = dva `Sprite2D` child nody (body + weapon overlay), oba s `region_rect` cell-pickerem nad horizontálními spritesheety. Žádné inter-pose animace, žádný `AnimationPlayer`, žádné lerpy — každý FSM stance má **právě jednu** buňku v sheetu a změna stancu = swap `region_rect` na hranici ticku. Body sprite je `add_child`ován jako první → kreslí se pod weapon spritem (Godot child draw order).

**Layout:**
- Body sheet: `res://sprites/<character>.png` (horizontální strip).
- Weapon sheet: `res://sprites/<character>_weapon.png` (**identický layout** — stejný count cell, stejný cell size, stejné pořadí stancí). Index se počítá jednou a aplikuje na oba sprity současně.
- Cell size je per-character const v `.gd` (`SPRITE_CELL_SIZE`):
  - `player.png` / `player_weapon.png` — 224×32, 7 cells of 32×32
  - `enemy_basic.png` / `enemy_basic_weapon.png` — 192×32, 6 cells of 32×32
- Display scale ×8 (`SPRITE_SCALE`) s `texture_filter = NEAREST` pro pixel-perfect rendering — 32px cell → 256px na obrazovce. Hit flash modulate se aplikuje na obě vrstvy.

**Mapování stance → cell:**
`SPRITE_INDEX := { &"<stance>": <idx>, ... }` v každém combatant `.gd`. `_update_sprite()` se volá na konci `tick()` (a okamžitě po `set_state(...)` ve vstupních handlerech v `player.gd`), nastaví `region_rect` a `modulate`.

**Sub-stance (jen player):**
`_current_visual_stance()` odvozuje vizuální stance z FSM stavu + sub-state proměnných:
- `attacking_strong` + `windup_ticks_remaining > 0` → `attacking_strong_windup`
- `attacking_strong` + `windup_ticks_remaining == 0` → `attacking_strong_recovery`
- `blocking` + `is_active_block()` → `blocking_active`
- `blocking` + jinak → `blocking_passive`

Enemy nemá sub-stance — mapování `state -> idx` je 1:1.

**Hit flash:** `sprite.modulate = Color(2.5, 2.5, 2.5, 1.0)` po dobu `hit_flash_ticks > 0`, jinak `Color.WHITE`. Žádný separate flash sprite cell.

**Per-character cell spec a extension guide:** viz `sprites/SPRITES.md`.

## Vizuální layout (720×1280)

```
+------------------------+
|     [Background.png]   |  ← horní 2/5 viewportu (0..512), CanvasLayer layer=-1
|     (scale ×2, anchor) |     (568×440 centrovaný horizontálně, bottom @ y=512)
|                        |
|                        |
|              [HP]      |  ← floating bars nad enemy (drawn v enemy.gd):
|              [Fat]     |     HP 120×10 @ y_off=−150, Fatigue 120×6 @ y_off=−138
|   [PLAYER]   [ENEMY]   |  ← y=384 (sprite bottom @ 3/5 z dolního okraje), scaled ×8 (~256 px)
|   (stance)   (stance)  |    player.x=264, enemy.x=456 (~8 src-px overlap při scale ×8)
|                        |
|                        |
|                        |
|  ↑=strong  →=weak      |  ← y≈1200, debug hint text
|  ↓=block   ←=dodge     |
+------------------------+
```

**Background** (`sprites/Background.png`, 284×206 src-px) je v `fight.tscn` jako `Sprite2D` uvnitř `CanvasLayer` s `layer = -1`, čímž se renderuje pod combatants i HUDem. `texture_filter = NEAREST`, integer scale ×6 → 1704×1236 px (přesahuje viewport nahoře i po stranách, záměrně). Bottom-anchored na "podlahu" y=512 (kde stojí postavy), position = `(360, -106)`. Pokud změníš výšku bg textury (cropnutím/přidáním), drž `position.y = 512 - (height * scale / 2)` aby bottom seděl s nohama postav. **Screen shake:** Fight.gd mirruje `position` (Node2D shake offset) do `background_canvas.offset` v `_update_shake`, takže bg se třese společně s ostatními combatants.

Pozice jsou vodítka — finální doladit po hraní. Sprite je child node combatantu se default position (0,0) — pohyb combatantu (shake) ho táhne s sebou.

**HP + fatigue bary enemy** jsou drawn v `enemy.gd._draw()` jako floating bary nad tělem (HP 120×10 px na y_off=−82, fatigue 120×6 px na y_off=−70 od středu). Důsledek: bary se hýbou se screen shake (parent `Fight` Node2D má shake offset → enemy + bary se posunou společně) a hit flash na ně nepůsobí (bary jsou samostatné draw cally po body rectu, ne tělo). `Combatant.damage_hp/heal_hp/add_fatigue/drain_fatigue` volají `queue_redraw()` aby se bar refreshly mimo state-transition ticky. HUD je už jen debug text + win overlay.

Vizuální stav indikace:
- Stance sprite swap (jedna buňka per stance) — viz `sprites/SPRITES.md`.
- **Polish vrstva** (`fight.gd`, čistě prezentační — gameplay neovlivňuje):
  - Screen shake při hitech, amplitude per-event (weak / strong / fatigue). Decay 30 px/s.
  - Hit flash: zasažený combatant 3 ticky bílý (`hit_flash_ticks` v `Combatant` se propaguje jako `sprite.modulate = Color(2.5, 2.5, 2.5, 1.0)` v `_update_sprite()`).
  - Particles: malé čtverečky odlétávají z bodu zásahu (oranžové = HP damage, žluté = fatigue drain). Per-frame update v `_process`, life ~0.45 s, alpha fade, drag 0.92. Spawn pouze na tick boundaries v resolve funkcích.

## Verifikace (manuální testy)

Po implementaci spustit `fight.tscn` a projít:

1. **Idle baseline:** nedělej nic 30 s → enemy útočí pravidelně, `hp` na cap 100, `fatigue` na cap 40. HP bar plný, fatigue bar plný.
2. **Active parry weak:** stiskni `↓` těsně před weak telegraph → enemy.fatigue −= 10 (25 % bar). Mimo 8-tick window → pouze ochrání, žádný drain.
3. **Blok strong neúčinný:** drž `↓` před strong telegraph (červený enemy) → enemy získá +10 HP / +30 fatigue. (Pokud jsou na capu, zůstanou na capu — pro test sniž je nejdřív hitem.)
4. **Dodge:** stiskni `←` ve správný čas → miss, žádný efekt. Druhý `←` během 24-tick cooldown nesmí zafungovat.
5. **Strong v idle:** stiskni `↑` během enemy idle → `enemy.fatigue −= 10`. Opakuj 4× → enemy přejde do `exhausted` na 64 ticků (vizuálně šedý).
6. **Weak v recovery:** stiskni `→` po enemy seku → `enemy.hp −= 15`. Swing je instant (žádný windup).
7. **Strong v exhausted:** během `exhausted` stiskni `↑` → `enemy.hp −= 25`.
8. **Win:** doved enemy HP na 0 → "VÝHRA" overlay, `Space` zavolá `reload_current_scene()`.
9. **Tunable:** změň jednu konstantu (např. `THREAT_WEAK_TICKS := 12` v `enemy_basic.gd`) a ověř, že timing slabého napřahu se zrychlí.

## Mimo scope této iterace (technické)

- Reálný stance art (zatím jen barevné dummy buňky); skutečný pixel-art vyplní stejné 24×N buňky.
- Inter-pose animace (multi-frame sprites na stance, `AnimationPlayer`).
- Touch input pro mobil — UI vrstva pro dotyková tlačítka, gesture detection.
- Další podtřídy `Enemy` (base připravena, ale jen `enemy_basic` v této iteraci).
- Player stats (HP, stamina) — `Combatant` to umožní bez refaktoru.
- Zvuky, hudba, particle efekty, screenshake.
- Persistence skóre, save game.
- Menu / scene flow vně `fight.tscn`.

extends Node2D

# Fight scene controller. Owns the 16 Hz tick accumulator, calls combatant
# ticks in order, resolves swing events, updates the HUD, checks win condition.

const TICKS_PER_SECOND := 16
const TICK_DURATION := 1.0 / TICKS_PER_SECOND

# Gameplay resolve numbers (damage, fatigue, regen, hit flash) live in
# `balance.json` and are accessed via the `Balance` autoload. Only visual
# polish constants (shake/particles) remain as `const` below.

# Polish fx — purely visual, no gameplay impact.
const SHAKE_HIT_WEAK := 4.0
const SHAKE_HIT_STRONG := 10.0
const SHAKE_FATIGUE := 3.0
const SHAKE_DECAY_PER_SEC := 30.0
const PARTICLES_HIT_DAMAGE := 10
const PARTICLES_FATIGUE := 6
const PARTICLE_LIFE_SECONDS := 0.45
const PARTICLE_SPEED_MIN := 80.0
const PARTICLE_SPEED_MAX := 220.0
const PARTICLE_SIZE := 4.0
const PARTICLE_DRAG := 0.92  # velocity multiplier per frame at 60 fps reference
const COLOR_HIT_DAMAGE := Color(1.0, 0.5, 0.3, 1.0)
const COLOR_FATIGUE_FX := Color(0.95, 0.85, 0.3, 1.0)
const COLOR_PLAYER_HIT := Color(0.9, 0.3, 0.3, 1.0)

@onready var player: Node2D = $Player
@onready var enemy: Node2D = $Enemy
@onready var hud: CanvasLayer = $HUD
@onready var background_canvas: CanvasLayer = $Background

var tick_acc: float = 0.0
var game_over: bool = false

# Polish fx state.
var shake_amount: float = 0.0
var rng_fx := RandomNumberGenerator.new()
# Each particle: {pos: Vector2, vel: Vector2, life: float, color: Color}
var particles: Array = []


func _process(delta: float) -> void:
	tick_acc += delta
	while tick_acc >= TICK_DURATION:
		tick_acc -= TICK_DURATION
		_on_tick()
	_update_shake(delta)
	_update_particles(delta)
	queue_redraw()


func _update_shake(delta: float) -> void:
	if shake_amount <= 0.0:
		position = Vector2.ZERO
		background_canvas.offset = Vector2.ZERO
		return
	var dir := Vector2(
		rng_fx.randf_range(-1.0, 1.0),
		rng_fx.randf_range(-1.0, 1.0)
	)
	if dir.length() > 0.001:
		dir = dir.normalized()
	position = dir * shake_amount
	# Mirror shake into the background CanvasLayer (it's outside the Fight
	# Node2D transform, so offset is the only way to shake it).
	background_canvas.offset = position
	shake_amount = maxf(0.0, shake_amount - SHAKE_DECAY_PER_SEC * delta)


func _update_particles(delta: float) -> void:
	for i in range(particles.size() - 1, -1, -1):
		var p: Dictionary = particles[i]
		p.life -= delta
		if p.life <= 0.0:
			particles.remove_at(i)
			continue
		p.pos += p.vel * delta
		p.vel *= PARTICLE_DRAG


func _trigger_shake(amount: float) -> void:
	# Combine — don't downgrade an already-bigger shake in progress.
	shake_amount = maxf(shake_amount, amount)


func _spawn_particles(at: Vector2, color: Color, count: int) -> void:
	for _i in count:
		var angle := rng_fx.randf_range(-PI, PI)
		var speed := rng_fx.randf_range(PARTICLE_SPEED_MIN, PARTICLE_SPEED_MAX)
		var vel := Vector2(cos(angle), sin(angle)) * speed
		particles.append({
			"pos": at,
			"vel": vel,
			"life": PARTICLE_LIFE_SECONDS,
			"color": color,
		})


func _between_combatants() -> Vector2:
	return (player.position + enemy.position) * 0.5


func _draw() -> void:
	for p: Dictionary in particles:
		var alpha := clampf(p.life / PARTICLE_LIFE_SECONDS, 0.0, 1.0)
		var col: Color = p.color
		col.a = alpha
		var s := PARTICLE_SIZE
		draw_rect(Rect2(p.pos - Vector2(s, s) * 0.5, Vector2(s, s)), col)


func _on_tick() -> void:
	if game_over:
		# In win state — only listen for restart.
		if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_SPACE):
			get_tree().reload_current_scene()
		_update_hud()
		return

	# Tick order: player first, enemy second. (Doesn't materially matter because
	# resolution happens after both have ticked, but keeps deterministic.)
	player.tick()
	enemy.tick()

	# Player input handled at tick boundary (post-countdown so freshly-finished
	# states allow new input on the same tick).
	player.handle_input()

	# Resolve enemy swing first (enemy attack lands on player).
	if enemy.swing_this_tick:
		_resolve_enemy_swing()

	# Then player swing (player attack lands on enemy).
	if player.swing_this_tick:
		_resolve_player_swing()

	# Fatigue → exhausted transition (enemy only — player has no fatigue).
	if enemy.fatigue <= 0 and enemy.state != &"exhausted":
		enemy.enter_exhausted()

	# Win check.
	if enemy.hp <= 0:
		game_over = true

	_update_hud()


# --- Resolves ------------------------------------------------------------

func _resolve_enemy_swing() -> void:
	# Enemy swing event on the last tick of threat_*.
	var kind: StringName = enemy.pending_attack_kind

	# 1. Player dodging (invincible window) → miss.
	if player.state == &"dodging" and player.dodge_invincible:
		return

	# 2. Weak attack + player blocking → block. Fatigue drain ONLY if the
	# block is still in its active parry window; otherwise it just protects.
	if kind == &"weak" and player.state == &"blocking":
		if player.is_active_block():
			enemy.drain_fatigue(Balance.enemy_fatigue_blocked_weak)
			_trigger_shake(SHAKE_FATIGUE)
			_spawn_particles(_between_combatants(), COLOR_FATIGUE_FX, PARTICLES_FATIGUE)
		return

	# 3. Strong attack + player blocking → block ineffective (fall through).
	# 4. Otherwise → player hit (player invincible, but enemy regens).
	enemy.heal_hp(Balance.enemy_hp_regen_on_hit)
	enemy.add_fatigue(Balance.enemy_fatigue_regen_on_hit)
	_trigger_shake(SHAKE_HIT_WEAK if kind == &"weak" else SHAKE_HIT_STRONG)
	player.trigger_flash(Balance.hit_flash_ticks)
	_spawn_particles(player.position, COLOR_PLAYER_HIT, PARTICLES_HIT_DAMAGE)


func _resolve_player_swing() -> void:
	var kind: StringName = player.pending_attack_kind
	var es: StringName = enemy.state

	# Enemy in threat_* → no effect (telegraph cannot be interrupted).
	if es == &"threat_weak" or es == &"threat_strong":
		return

	# Enemy in idle → blocks player attacks, with strong draining fatigue.
	if es == &"idle":
		if kind == &"strong":
			enemy.drain_fatigue(Balance.enemy_fatigue_player_strong_idle)
			_trigger_shake(SHAKE_FATIGUE)
			_spawn_particles(enemy.position, COLOR_FATIGUE_FX, PARTICLES_FATIGUE)
		# TODO: future visual block feedback could be a temporary sprite swap
		# (e.g. a `block_react` stance cell) on enemy.gd. For now no extra fx.
		return

	# Enemy in recovery_* or exhausted → hit lands.
	if es == &"recovery_weak" or es == &"recovery_strong" or es == &"exhausted":
		if kind == &"weak":
			enemy.damage_hp(Balance.hp_damage_weak)
			_trigger_shake(SHAKE_HIT_WEAK)
		else:
			enemy.damage_hp(Balance.hp_damage_strong)
			_trigger_shake(SHAKE_HIT_STRONG)
		enemy.trigger_flash(Balance.hit_flash_ticks)
		_spawn_particles(enemy.position, COLOR_HIT_DAMAGE, PARTICLES_HIT_DAMAGE)
		return

	# Fallback (shouldn't normally hit): treat as blocked.


func _update_hud() -> void:
	# State-ticks field is repurposed per-state for visibility:
	#   blocking → active parry window remaining (0..Balance.block_active_ticks)
	#   other    → state_ticks_remaining
	var p_ticks: int = player.state_ticks_remaining
	if player.state == &"blocking":
		p_ticks = player.active_block_ticks_remaining()
	hud.update(
		enemy.hp, enemy.fatigue, enemy.state, enemy.state_ticks_remaining,
		player.state, p_ticks,
		player.dodge_cooldown_ticks, game_over
	)

file.content:
class_name Combatant
extends Node2D

# Base stateful entity. Holds hp, fatigue, current state and remaining ticks.
# Subclasses (Player, Enemy) decide transitions; this base only owns the
# countdown and getters/setters.

var hp: int = Balance.hp_max
var fatigue: int = Balance.fatigue_max
var state: StringName = &"idle"
var state_ticks_remaining: int = 0

# True for exactly one tick when state transitions on its own due to countdown.
# Subclasses can also set their own "swing_this_tick" flag for tick-precise events.
var state_expired_this_tick: bool = false

# Polish: white-flash overlay when this combatant gets hit. Ticked down here;
# subclass _draw() overrides body colour while > 0.
var hit_flash_ticks: int = 0


func set_state(new_state: StringName, ticks: int) -> void:
	state = new_state
	state_ticks_remaining = ticks


func trigger_flash(ticks: int) -> void:
	hit_flash_ticks = ticks
	queue_redraw()


func tick() -> void:
	state_expired_this_tick = false
	if hit_flash_ticks > 0:
		hit_flash_ticks -= 1
		queue_redraw()  # repaint as flash starts and again when it ends
	if state_ticks_remaining > 0:
		state_ticks_remaining -= 1
		if state_ticks_remaining <= 0:
			state_expired_this_tick = true


func damage_hp(amount: int) -> void:
	hp = clampi(hp - amount, 0, Balance.hp_max)
	queue_redraw()


func heal_hp(amount: int) -> void:
	hp = clampi(hp + amount, 0, Balance.hp_max)
	queue_redraw()


func add_fatigue(amount: int) -> void:
	fatigue = clampi(fatigue + amount, 0, Balance.fatigue_max)
	queue_redraw()


func drain_fatigue(amount: int) -> void:
	fatigue = clampi(fatigue - amount, 0, Balance.fatigue_max)
	queue_redraw()

content.content:
1	extends Combatant
2	
3	# Player FSM. Input drives state transitions. Swing event lands on the last
4	# tick of the windup; fight.gd reads `swing_this_tick` + `pending_attack_kind`.
5	
6	# Gameplay tunables (timing, cooldowns, parry window) live in `balance.json`
7	# and are accessed via the `Balance` autoload. Only visual / layout constants
8	# remain as `const` below.
9	
10	# --- Sprite rendering ----------------------------------------------------
11	# Player body = Sprite2D with region_rect cell-picker. Each FSM stance
12	# (including derived sub-stances) maps to exactly one cell in the strip.
13	# A second Sprite2D (weapon) overlays the body using the same cell index —
14	# weapon sheet has the same layout, just a separate texture.
15	# See sprites/SPRITES.md for the per-cell stance spec.
16	const SPRITE_SHEET := preload("res://sprites/player.png")
17	const WEAPON_SHEET := preload("res://sprites/player_weapon.png")
18	const SPRITE_CELL_SIZE := Vector2i(32, 32)
19	const SPRITE_SCALE := 8.0
20	const SPRITE_HIT_FLASH_MODULATE := Color(2.5, 2.5, 2.5, 1.0)
21	const SPRITE_INDEX := {
22		&"idle": 0,
23		&"attacking_weak": 1,
24		&"attacking_strong_windup": 2,
25		&"attacking_strong_recovery": 3,
26		&"blocking_active": 4,
27		&"blocking_passive": 5,
28		&"dodging": 6,
29	}
30	
31	var sprite: Sprite2D
32	var weapon_sprite: Sprite2D
33	
34	# Set true for exactly one tick when player executes a swing event.
35	var swing_this_tick: bool = false
36	# &"weak" or &"strong" — read on swing tick.
37	var pending_attack_kind: StringName = &"weak"
38	
39	# Remaining ticks of the windup portion of an attack. When this hits 0 and
40	# state is attacking_*, swing fires on that tick and recovery begins.
41	var windup_ticks_remaining: int = 0
42	
43	# Ticks elapsed since entering &"blocking". Used to compute active parry window.
44	var blocking_ticks_elapsed: int = 0
45	
46	# Tracks dodge cooldown (separate from state countdown so we can be in idle
47	# while still on cooldown).
48	var dodge_cooldown_ticks: int = 0
49	
50	# Tracks weak-attack cooldown (counted alongside the attacking_weak state — by
51	# the time we're back in idle, this still has a few ticks left to gate spam).
52	var weak_cooldown_ticks: int = 0
53	
54	# True while we're in the invincibility portion of dodging.
55	var dodge_invincible: bool = false
56	
57	
58	func _ready() -> void:
59		sprite = _make_sprite(SPRITE_SHEET)
60		add_child(sprite)
61		# weapon_sprite added after body → drawn on top in same _draw pass.
62		weapon_sprite = _make_sprite(WEAPON_SHEET)
63		add_child(weapon_sprite)
64		set_state(&"idle", 0)
65		_update_sprite()
66	
67	
68	func _make_sprite(sheet: Texture2D) -> Sprite2D:
69		var s := Sprite2D.new()
70		s.texture = sheet
71		s.region_enabled = true
72		s.region_rect = Rect2(0, 0, SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.x, SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.y)
73		s.scale = Vector2(SPRITE_SCALE, SPRITE_SCALE)
74		s.texture_filter = CanvasItem.TEXTURE_FILTER_NEAREST
75		return s
76	
77	
78	# Called by fight.gd in tick order BEFORE input handling each tick so countdown
79	# advances first. Input handling lives separately in handle_input().
80	func tick() -> void:
81		swing_this_tick = false
82		if dodge_cooldown_ticks > 0:
83			dodge_cooldown_ticks -= 1
84		if weak_cooldown_ticks > 0:
85			weak_cooldown_ticks -= 1
86	
87		# Attack states use a separate windup counter so we can fire the swing
88		# event on the last windup tick, then continue into recovery within the
89		# same `attacking_*` state.
90		if state == &"attacking_weak" or state == &"attacking_strong":
91			if windup_ticks_remaining > 0:
92				windup_ticks_remaining -= 1
93				if windup_ticks_remaining == 0:
94					# This tick IS the last windup tick — swing now.
95					swing_this_tick = true
96	
97		# Track block age for parry window — only the first block_active_ticks of a
98		# block drain enemy fatigue.
99		if state == &"blocking":
100			blocking_ticks_elapsed += 1
101	
102		# Update dodge phase tracking before generic countdown.
103		if state == &"dodging":
104			# Invincibility lasts the first dodge_invincibility ticks of the
105			# 8-tick state. state_ticks_remaining starts at 8 and decrements.
106			var elapsed: int = Balance.dodge_invincibility + Balance.dodge_recover - state_ticks_remaining
107			dodge_invincible = elapsed < Balance.dodge_invincibility
108	
109		super.tick()
110	
111		if state_expired_this_tick:
112			_on_state_expired()
113	
114		_update_sprite()
115	
116	
117	func _on_state_expired() -> void:
118		match state:
119			&"attacking_weak", &"attacking_strong", &"dodging":
120				dodge_invincible = false
121				set_state(&"idle", 0)
122			_:
123				pass
124	
125	
126	# Called from fight.gd._on_tick() AFTER tick() so input is sampled at tick
127	# boundaries (not per-frame). This keeps everything deterministic on the tick
128	# grid.
129	func handle_input() -> void:
130		# Inputs are only accepted in idle or blocking states. attacking_* and
131		# dodging swallow input until they finish.
132		# v1 keyboard-only mapping: arrow keys. Right = fast weak attack, Up =
133		# strong attack, Down (hold) = block, Left (tap) = dodge.
134		match state:
135			&"idle":
136				# Block has highest priority (held) — must check before tap actions
137				# so player can transition out of attacks-finished into block on
138				# the same tick.
139				if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_DOWN):
140					set_state(&"blocking", 0)
141					blocking_ticks_elapsed = 0
142					_update_sprite()
143					return
144				if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_RIGHT) and weak_cooldown_ticks == 0:
145					_begin_attack(&"weak")
146					return
147				if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_UP):
148					_begin_attack(&"strong")
149					return
150				if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_LEFT) and dodge_cooldown_ticks == 0:
151					_begin_dodge()
152					return
153			&"blocking":
154				if not Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_DOWN):
155					set_state(&"idle", 0)
156					_update_sprite()
157	
158	
159	func _begin_attack(kind: StringName) -> void:
160		pending_attack_kind = kind
161		var windup: int
162		var recover: int
163		if kind == &"weak":
164			windup = Balance.attack_weak_windup
165			recover = Balance.attack_weak_recover
166			set_state(&"attacking_weak", windup + recover)
167			weak_cooldown_ticks = Balance.attack_weak_cooldown
168		else:
169			windup = Balance.attack_strong_windup
170			recover = Balance.attack_strong_recover
171			set_state(&"attacking_strong", windup + recover)
172		windup_ticks_remaining = windup
173	
174		# Zero-windup attacks (weak) swing instantly this tick.
175		if windup == 0:
176			swing_this_tick = true
177		_update_sprite()
178	
179	
180	func _begin_dodge() -> void:
181		set_state(&"dodging", Balance.dodge_invincibility + Balance.dodge_recover)
182		dodge_invincible = true
183		dodge_cooldown_ticks = Balance.dodge_cooldown
184		_update_sprite()
185	
186	
187	func is_active_block() -> bool:
188		return state == &"blocking" and blocking_ticks_elapsed < Balance.block_active_ticks
189	
190	
191	func active_block_ticks_remaining() -> int:
192		if state != &"blocking":
193			return 0
194		return maxi(0, Balance.block_active_ticks - blocking_ticks_elapsed)
195	
196	
197	# --- Sprite helpers ------------------------------------------------------
198	
199	func _current_visual_stance() -> StringName:
200		match state:
201			&"attacking_strong":
202				return &"attacking_strong_windup" if windup_ticks_remaining > 0 else &"attacking_strong_recovery"
203			&"blocking":
204				return &"blocking_active" if is_active_block() else &"blocking_passive"
205			_:
206				return state
207	
208	
209	func _update_sprite() -> void:
210		var idx: int = SPRITE_INDEX.get(_current_visual_stance(), 0)
211		var rect := Rect2(idx * SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.x, 0,
212				SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.x, SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.y)
213		var mod: Color = SPRITE_HIT_FLASH_MODULATE if hit_flash_ticks > 0 else Color.WHITE
214		sprite.region_rect = rect
215		sprite.modulate = mod
216		weapon_sprite.region_rect = rect
217		weapon_sprite.modulate = mod
218

file.content:
extends Combatant

# Player FSM. Input drives state transitions. Swing event lands on the last
# tick of the windup; fight.gd reads `swing_this_tick` + `pending_attack_kind`.

# Gameplay tunables (timing, cooldowns, parry window) live in `balance.json`
# and are accessed via the `Balance` autoload. Only visual / layout constants
# remain as `const` below.

# --- Sprite rendering ----------------------------------------------------
# Player body = Sprite2D with region_rect cell-picker. Each FSM stance
# (including derived sub-stances) maps to exactly one cell in the strip.
# A second Sprite2D (weapon) overlays the body using the same cell index —
# weapon sheet has the same layout, just a separate texture.
# See sprites/SPRITES.md for the per-cell stance spec.
const SPRITE_SHEET := preload("res://sprites/player.png")
const WEAPON_SHEET := preload("res://sprites/player_weapon.png")
const SPRITE_CELL_SIZE := Vector2i(32, 32)
const SPRITE_SCALE := 8.0
const SPRITE_HIT_FLASH_MODULATE := Color(2.5, 2.5, 2.5, 1.0)
const SPRITE_INDEX := {
	&"idle": 0,
	&"attacking_weak": 1,
	&"attacking_strong_windup": 2,
	&"attacking_strong_recovery": 3,
	&"blocking_active": 4,
	&"blocking_passive": 5,
	&"dodging": 6,
}

var sprite: Sprite2D
var weapon_sprite: Sprite2D

# Set true for exactly one tick when player executes a swing event.
var swing_this_tick: bool = false
# &"weak" or &"strong" — read on swing tick.
var pending_attack_kind: StringName = &"weak"

# Remaining ticks of the windup portion of an attack. When this hits 0 and
# state is attacking_*, swing fires on that tick and recovery begins.
var windup_ticks_remaining: int = 0

# Ticks elapsed since entering &"blocking". Used to compute active parry window.
var blocking_ticks_elapsed: int = 0

# Tracks dodge cooldown (separate from state countdown so we can be in idle
# while still on cooldown).
var dodge_cooldown_ticks: int = 0

# Tracks weak-attack cooldown (counted alongside the attacking_weak state — by
# the time we're back in idle, this still has a few ticks left to gate spam).
var weak_cooldown_ticks: int = 0

# True while we're in the invincibility portion of dodging.
var dodge_invincible: bool = false


func _ready() -> void:
	sprite = _make_sprite(SPRITE_SHEET)
	add_child(sprite)
	# weapon_sprite added after body → drawn on top in same _draw pass.
	weapon_sprite = _make_sprite(WEAPON_SHEET)
	add_child(weapon_sprite)
	set_state(&"idle", 0)
	_update_sprite()


func _make_sprite(sheet: Texture2D) -> Sprite2D:
	var s := Sprite2D.new()
	s.texture = sheet
	s.region_enabled = true
	s.region_rect = Rect2(0, 0, SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.x, SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.y)
	s.scale = Vector2(SPRITE_SCALE, SPRITE_SCALE)
	s.texture_filter = CanvasItem.TEXTURE_FILTER_NEAREST
	return s


# Called by fight.gd in tick order BEFORE input handling each tick so countdown
# advances first. Input handling lives separately in handle_input().
func tick() -> void:
	swing_this_tick = false
	if dodge_cooldown_ticks > 0:
		dodge_cooldown_ticks -= 1
	if weak_cooldown_ticks > 0:
		weak_cooldown_ticks -= 1

	# Attack states use a separate windup counter so we can fire the swing
	# event on the last windup tick, then continue into recovery within the
	# same `attacking_*` state.
	if state == &"attacking_weak" or state == &"attacking_strong":
		if windup_ticks_remaining > 0:
			windup_ticks_remaining -= 1
			if windup_ticks_remaining == 0:
				# This tick IS the last windup tick — swing now.
				swing_this_tick = true

	# Track block age for parry window — only the first block_active_ticks of a
	# block drain enemy fatigue.
	if state == &"blocking":
		blocking_ticks_elapsed += 1

	# Update dodge phase tracking before generic countdown.
	if state == &"dodging":
		# Invincibility lasts the first dodge_invincibility ticks of the
		# 8-tick state. state_ticks_remaining starts at 8 and decrements.
		var elapsed: int = Balance.dodge_invincibility + Balance.dodge_recover - state_ticks_remaining
		dodge_invincible = elapsed < Balance.dodge_invincibility

	super.tick()

	if state_expired_this_tick:
		_on_state_expired()

	_update_sprite()


func _on_state_expired() -> void:
	match state:
		&"attacking_weak", &"attacking_strong", &"dodging":
			dodge_invincible = false
			set_state(&"idle", 0)
		_:
			pass


# Called from fight.gd._on_tick() AFTER tick() so input is sampled at tick
# boundaries (not per-frame). This keeps everything deterministic on the tick
# grid.
func handle_input() -> void:
	# Inputs are only accepted in idle or blocking states. attacking_* and
	# dodging swallow input until they finish.
	# v1 keyboard-only mapping: arrow keys. Right = fast weak attack, Up =
	# strong attack, Down (hold) = block, Left (tap) = dodge.
	match state:
		&"idle":
			# Block has highest priority (held) — must check before tap actions
			# so player can transition out of attacks-finished into block on
			# the same tick.
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_DOWN):
				set_state(&"blocking", 0)
				blocking_ticks_elapsed = 0
				_update_sprite()
				return
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_RIGHT) and weak_cooldown_ticks == 0:
				_begin_attack(&"weak")
				return
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_UP):
				_begin_attack(&"strong")
				return
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_LEFT) and dodge_cooldown_ticks == 0:
				_begin_dodge()
				return
		&"blocking":
			if not Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_DOWN):
				set_state(&"idle", 0)
				_update_sprite()


func _begin_attack(kind: StringName) -> void:
	pending_attack_kind = kind
	var windup: int
	var recover: int
	if kind == &"weak":
		windup = Balance.attack_weak_windup
		recover = Balance.attack_weak_recover
		set_state(&"attacking_weak", windup + recover)
		weak_cooldown_ticks = Balance.attack_weak_cooldown
	else:
		windup = Balance.attack_strong_windup
		recover = Balance.attack_strong_recover
		set_state(&"attacking_strong", windup + recover)
	windup_ticks_remaining = windup

	# Zero-windup attacks (weak) swing instantly this tick.
	if windup == 0:
		swing_this_tick = true
	_update_sprite()


func _begin_dodge() -> void:
	set_state(&"dodging", Balance.dodge_invincibility + Balance.dodge_recover)
	dodge_invincible = true
	dodge_cooldown_ticks = Balance.dodge_cooldown
	_update_sprite()


func is_active_block() -> bool:
	return state == &"blocking" and blocking_ticks_elapsed < Balance.block_active_ticks


func active_block_ticks_remaining() -> int:
	if state != &"blocking":
		return 0
	return maxi(0, Balance.block_active_ticks - blocking_ticks_elapsed)


# --- Sprite helpers ------------------------------------------------------

func _current_visual_stance() -> StringName:
	match state:
		&"attacking_strong":
			return &"attacking_strong_windup" if windup_ticks_remaining > 0 else &"attacking_strong_recovery"
		&"blocking":
			return &"blocking_active" if is_active_block() else &"blocking_passive"
		_:
			return state


func _update_sprite() -> void:
	var idx: int = SPRITE_INDEX.get(_current_visual_stance(), 0)
	var rect := Rect2(idx * SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.x, 0,
			SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.x, SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.y)
	var mod: Color = SPRITE_HIT_FLASH_MODULATE if hit_flash_ticks > 0 else Color.WHITE
	sprite.region_rect = rect
	sprite.modulate = mod
	weapon_sprite.region_rect = rect
	weapon_sprite.modulate = mod

1	class_name Enemy
2	extends Combatant
3	
4	# Abstract enemy. Concrete subclasses must override _pick_attack and
5	# _pick_idle_duration. Owns enemy FSM transitions (idle -> threat -> recovery
6	# -> idle, plus exhausted side branch). Swing event happens on the last tick
7	# of threat_* — fight.gd reads `swing_this_tick` & `pending_attack_kind`.
8	
9	# --- Sprite rendering ----------------------------------------------------
10	# Enemy body = Sprite2D with region_rect cell-picker. Each FSM stance
11	# maps 1:1 to a cell in the strip (no sub-stances for basic enemy). A second
12	# Sprite2D (weapon) overlays the body using the same cell index. These
13	# consts live in the base class for this iteration because we only have one
14	# enemy type (enemy_basic). If a future enemy type wants its own sheets, move
15	# these into the subclass and let base expose abstract accessors.
16	# See sprites/SPRITES.md for the per-cell stance spec.
17	const SPRITE_SHEET := preload("res://sprites/enemy_basic.png")
18	const WEAPON_SHEET := preload("res://sprites/enemy_basic_weapon.png")
19	const SPRITE_CELL_SIZE := Vector2i(32, 32)
20	const SPRITE_SCALE := 8.0
21	const SPRITE_HIT_FLASH_MODULATE := Color(2.5, 2.5, 2.5, 1.0)
22	const SPRITE_INDEX := {
23		&"idle": 0,
24		&"threat_weak": 1,
25		&"threat_strong": 2,
26		&"recovery_weak": 3,
27		&"recovery_strong": 4,
28		&"exhausted": 5,
29	}
30	
31	# Floating HP + fatigue bars above the body. Drawn here in _draw() (the sprite
32	# child node draws separately and sits visually below — bars are above body
33	# anyway at y_offset=-82/-70 so there's no overlap).
34	const HP_BAR_SIZE := Vector2(120, 10)
35	const HP_BAR_OFFSET_Y := -150.0  # bar top-left.y, relative to enemy center
36	const FATIGUE_BAR_SIZE := Vector2(120, 6)
37	const FATIGUE_BAR_OFFSET_Y := -138.0  # sits 2 px below HP bar
38	const COLOR_BAR_BG := Color(0.15, 0.15, 0.2, 1.0)
39	const COLOR_HP_BAR_FILL := Color(0.85, 0.2, 0.2, 1.0)
40	const COLOR_FATIGUE_BAR_FILL := Color(0.95, 0.85, 0.25, 1.0)
41	
42	var rng := RandomNumberGenerator.new()
43	var sprite: Sprite2D
44	var weapon_sprite: Sprite2D
45	
46	# Set true for exactly one tick when threat phase resolves into a swing.
47	var swing_this_tick: bool = false
48	# Which attack was telegraphed — &"weak" or &"strong" — read on swing tick.
49	var pending_attack_kind: StringName = &"weak"
50	
51	
52	func _ready() -> void:
53		rng.randomize()
54		sprite = _make_sprite(SPRITE_SHEET)
55		add_child(sprite)
56		# weapon_sprite added after body → drawn on top in same _draw pass.
57		weapon_sprite = _make_sprite(WEAPON_SHEET)
58		add_child(weapon_sprite)
59		# Start idle.
60		_enter_idle()
61	
62	
63	func _make_sprite(sheet: Texture2D) -> Sprite2D:
64		var s := Sprite2D.new()
65		s.texture = sheet
66		s.region_enabled = true
67		s.region_rect = Rect2(0, 0, SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.x, SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.y)
68		s.scale = Vector2(SPRITE_SCALE, SPRITE_SCALE)
69		s.texture_filter = CanvasItem.TEXTURE_FILTER_NEAREST
70		return s
71	
72	
73	func _draw() -> void:
74		# Floating HP bar above the enemy body.
75		var hp_origin := Vector2(-HP_BAR_SIZE.x * 0.5, HP_BAR_OFFSET_Y)
76		draw_rect(Rect2(hp_origin, HP_BAR_SIZE), COLOR_BAR_BG)
77		var hp_pct: float = float(hp) / float(Balance.hp_max)
78		draw_rect(Rect2(hp_origin, Vector2(HP_BAR_SIZE.x * hp_pct, HP_BAR_SIZE.y)),
79				COLOR_HP_BAR_FILL)
80	
81		# Floating fatigue bar, just below the HP bar.
82		var fat_origin := Vector2(-FATIGUE_BAR_SIZE.x * 0.5, FATIGUE_BAR_OFFSET_Y)
83		draw_rect(Rect2(fat_origin, FATIGUE_BAR_SIZE), COLOR_BAR_BG)
84		var fat_pct: float = float(fatigue) / float(Balance.fatigue_max)
85		draw_rect(Rect2(fat_origin, Vector2(FATIGUE_BAR_SIZE.x * fat_pct, FATIGUE_BAR_SIZE.y)),
86				COLOR_FATIGUE_BAR_FILL)
87	
88	
89	func tick() -> void:
90		swing_this_tick = false
91		super.tick()
92		if state_expired_this_tick:
93			_advance_state_after_expiry()
94		elif (state == &"threat_weak" or state == &"threat_strong") and state_ticks_remaining == 0:
95			# Defensive: if countdown landed exactly on zero before expiry flag
96			# (shouldn't happen since tick() sets the flag, but keep safe).
97			swing_this_tick = true
98		_update_sprite()
99	
100	
101	func _advance_state_after_expiry() -> void:
102		# Called the same tick the previous state expired.
103		match state:
104			&"idle":
105				_decide_attack()
106			&"threat_weak":
107				# Last tick of threat = swing event.
108				swing_this_tick = true
109				set_state(&"recovery_weak", _recovery_weak_ticks())
110			&"threat_strong":
111				swing_this_tick = true
112				set_state(&"recovery_strong", _recovery_strong_ticks())
113			&"recovery_weak", &"recovery_strong":
114				_enter_idle()
115			&"exhausted":
116				fatigue = Balance.fatigue_max
117				_enter_idle()
118			_:
119				_enter_idle()
120	
121	
122	func _enter_idle() -> void:
123		set_state(&"idle", _pick_idle_duration(rng))
124		pending_attack_kind = &"weak"
125	
126	
127	func _decide_attack() -> void:
128		pending_attack_kind = _pick_attack(rng)
129		if pending_attack_kind == &"strong":
130			var t: int = _threat_strong_ticks()
131			set_state(&"threat_strong", t)
132		else:
133			var tw: int = _threat_weak_ticks()
134			set_state(&"threat_weak", tw)
135	
136	
137	# Called by fight.gd when fatigue drops to 0 outside of exhausted.
138	func enter_exhausted() -> void:
139		set_state(&"exhausted", _exhausted_ticks())
140	
141	
142	# --- Sprite helpers ------------------------------------------------------
143	
144	func _update_sprite() -> void:
145		# Enemy has no sub-stances — state maps 1:1 to a cell index.
146		var idx: int = SPRITE_INDEX.get(state, 0)
147		var rect := Rect2(idx * SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.x, 0,
148				SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.x, SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.y)
149		var mod: Color = SPRITE_HIT_FLASH_MODULATE if hit_flash_ticks > 0 else Color.WHITE
150		sprite.region_rect = rect
151		sprite.modulate = mod
152		weapon_sprite.region_rect = rect
153		weapon_sprite.modulate = mod
154	
155	
156	# --- Abstract hooks ------------------------------------------------------
157	
158	func _pick_attack(_rng: RandomNumberGenerator) -> StringName:
159		# Override in subclass.
160		return &"weak"
161	
162	
163	func _pick_idle_duration(_rng: RandomNumberGenerator) -> int:
164		# Override in subclass.
165		return 48
166	
167	
168	# --- Tunable accessors (overridable) -------------------------------------
169	
170	func _threat_weak_ticks() -> int:
171		return 24
172	
173	
174	func _threat_strong_ticks() -> int:
175		return 32
176	
177	
178	func _recovery_weak_ticks() -> int:
179		return 8
180	
181	
182	func _recovery_strong_ticks() -> int:
183		return 16
184	
185	
186	func _exhausted_ticks() -> int:
187		return 64
